basic.name: Akin Gundogdu
basic.summary: Senior Full Stack Software Engineer & Product Engineer with 17+ years of experience building scalable web, mobile, and cloud products. Passionate about AI, indie making, elegant architectures, and shipping fast with quality.

experiences.title: Senior Full Stack Software Engineer
experiences.details: Backend engineer on the mobile team at Kajabi, the all-in-one platform powering 50,000+ knowledge entrepreneurs across 120 countries and $4B+ in sales. Delivering greenfield and iterative work across a complex, highly interconnected backend; contributing to iOS/Android code areas when needed. Since 2025 heavily invested in AI-assisted workflows — rule sets, prompt engineering, and experimenting with new techniques across the product.

experiences.title: Engineering Manager / Lead Full Stack Software Engineer
experiences.details: Grew from Lead Engineer to Engineering Manager. Owned software architecture, provided technical support across the engineering org, and managed the full engineering team — planning, hiring, mentoring, and execution. Superpeer is an all-in-one video platform (livestreams, courses, 1:1 coaching, community, subscriptions).

experiences.title: Chief Technology Officer
experiences.details: Planned sprints, managed teams and defined software architecture for an online hiring platform connecting logistics candidates with employers. Led all engineering decisions across backend, frontend, and infrastructure.

experiences.title: Lead Fullstack Software Engineer
experiences.details: Planned sprints, managed teams and converted existing SaaS projects to a DDD-based architecture for an outsourcing studio that has shipped 100+ products over 13 years.

experiences.title: Lead Fullstack Software Engineer
experiences.sub_title: Global Investment & Trading · London, United Kingdom
experiences.details: Built real-time trading and charting features for a platform used by 30M+ traders and investors. Implemented business logic and UIs with PHP Laravel/Lumen and Vue, streaming real-time market data from financial sources (BoE) into trading charts.

experiences.title: Chief Technology Officer
experiences.details: Built the engineering team from scratch and designed a microservices architecture of 258 services handling 50M+ requests/day for a sports platform connecting athletes, clubs, sponsors, officials and fans. Shipped web, native iOS (285 views, Swift), CRM, event manager, Medicard health passport and social platform products.

experiences.title: iOS Developer
experiences.details: Rebranded an existing iOS app — built a new Swift version, refactored legacy Objective-C, designed custom UI elements and integrated 3rd-party services (Maps, SMS API). UI designed in Sketch and Adobe Experience Designer.

experiences.title: Software Engineer
experiences.details: Delivered multiple internal projects as a full-stack engineer. Database design, architecture, code reviews and deployments across microservices and monoliths. Stack: ASP.NET MVC (C#), MSSQL, TFS/VSTS, Redis, Azure; Angular.js, TypeScript, jQuery, Sencha, DevExpress, Cordova.

experiences.title: Software Engineer
experiences.details: Built the full order-to-delivery web platform for a specialty animal-feed producer, including the proprietary formulation algorithms. System still running in production.

experiences.title: iOS App Developer
experiences.details: Native iOS app for a zoo center built in Swift, with Firebase for data and push notifications.

experiences.title: Mid Level Software Engineer
experiences.details: Refactored legacy apps to Angular.js for web and mobile, managed code reviews and deployments, and contributed to the CRM with SAP module integration.

experiences.title: Junior Software Engineer
experiences.sub_title: Shift Technic - MSE Computer and Software · Izmir, Turkey
experiences.details: Early-career software engineering role delivering custom software solutions.

experiences.title: Junior Software Engineer
experiences.details: Engineering role at Dokuz Eylul University contributing to internal software projects.

experiences.title: Junior Software Engineer
experiences.details: First professional engineering role, working across a range of client software projects.

education.title: Computer Engineering
education.details: Graduated from Dokuz Eylul University in Alsancak, Izmir, with a focus on software engineering, algorithms and data structures.

education.title: Developing ASP.NET MVC Web Applications (MCSD)
education.details: Microsoft certification covering ASP.NET MVC, C#, Web API, and modern .NET web application development practices.

education.title: Developing Microsoft Azure and Web Services (MCSD)
education.details: Microsoft certification covering Azure cloud services, WCF, Web API and scalable web service design.
